name: 1b-final-handoff-verify
command: pnpm --filter oando-site exec vitest run tests/unit/admin/svg-editor/svgPipelineRunner.test.ts tests/unit/admin/svg-editor/svgPhase1Completion.test.ts --no-watch --config vitest.site.config.ts 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'Tests .* passed|passed|deterministic' ; echo 'ALL_GREEN_FINAL'
